TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_dadiw_atu_lukiyaw, title = dadiw_atu_lukiyaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/dadiw_atu_lukiyaw} }

S.FORM: dadiw atu lukiyaw mudadiw sa ku sikizaya. u lukiyaw caykalcad, sapamelaw tu tamdw sa u salukiyaw, u sapamelaw tu di'tu sa, mapalaw han. u mapalaway, namakayda i mapalaw ni pangangan, micukumisay malupu maluwahluwah sa, lukiyaw, u salukiyauhan. i taywanay a yincumin, u lukiyau nu heni, hiding tuni kaudip atu mahica ku lalangawan a misalukiyaw, u sakidaya a tamdaw mikilim tu lukiyaw a misuped sa, u lukiyaw nu sakidaya pakaynin ini kaluk, mibutingay ani kaudip ku lukiyaw. lalikid sakidaya mi cukumisay a lukiyaw lalikid han, u tatengaay milalikid, a palcaden ku kuku, paicelangen ku lima tawya sangulan, u lisin u masinanuday, tatengangay a lisin u tatama' dada' ku talabuway i sasalisinan malalikid, mahamin satu misa lisin sa, nu tatayda tu kumi salakiyaway. salukiyaw nasikamu u tatayna nu niyadu, inikaudip i demidemiad atu maluwahluwah' a lukiyaw, u salukiyaw han, milalad tuni ka udip, hinan u milutukay, mibutingay, patawsiyay, miapaay tu wawa, mahamin maluk pakatawatawa naming, paktineng tuni kaudip nu sakinaya. i lukiyaw nu tatama, u kuku', u wayway ku sakamun, uduma satalakawen ku kuku mihuwad, paydikuden mi tukud atu mihubahup u tatayda sa, u udip ku mitiyungay mikelid tu kuku' atu lima, hinan u nu muluungay misalukiyaw. i kaluluway a niyadu ci kiniw hinisa, u sakidaya a tatayda masikad, kyu misalakiyaw sa, cayka hida tu pangcah mitatebut pihaceng kuwayway.
S.PHON: dadiw atu r~…ĺukijaw mudadiw sa ku sikizaja. u r~…ĺukijaw ¶ajkar~…ĺ ¶ad, sapam…ôr~…ĺaw tu tamdw sa u sar~…ĺukijaw, u sapam…ôr~…ĺaw tu di Ē~ °tu sa, mapar~…ĺaw ńßan. u mapar~…ĺawaj, namakajda i mapar~…ĺaw ni paŇčaŇčan, mi ¶ukumisaj mar~…ĺupu mar~…ĺuwańßr~…ĺuwańß sa, r~…ĺukijaw, u sar~…ĺukijauńßan. i tajwanaj a jin ¶umin, u r~…ĺukijau nu ńß…ôni, ńßidiŇč tuni kaudip atu mańßi ¶a ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a misar~…ĺukijaw, u sakidaja a tamdaw mikir~…ĺim tu r~…ĺukijaw a misup…ôd sa, u r~…ĺukijaw nu sakidaja pakajnin ini kar~…ĺuk, mibutiŇčaj ani kaudip ku r~…ĺukijaw. r~…ĺar~…ĺikid sakidaja mi ¶ukumisaj a r~…ĺukijaw r~…ĺar~…ĺikid ńßan, u tat…ôŇčaaj mir~…ĺar~…ĺikid, a par~…ĺ ¶ad…ôn ku kuku, pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ku r~…ĺima tawja saŇčur~…ĺan, u r~…ĺisin u masinanudaj, tat…ôŇčaŇčaj a r~…ĺisin u tatama Ē~ ° dada Ē~ ° ku tar~…ĺabuwaj i sasar~…ĺisinan mar~…ĺar~…ĺikid, mańßamin satu misa r~…ĺisin sa, nu tatajda tu kumi sar~…ĺakijawaj. sar~…ĺukijaw nasikamu u tatajna nu nijadu, inikaudip i d…ômid…ômiad atu mar~…ĺuwańßr~…ĺuwańß Ē~ ° a r~…ĺukijaw, u sar~…ĺukijaw ńßan, mir~…ĺar~…ĺad tuni ka udip, ńßinan u mir~…ĺutukaj, mibutiŇčaj, patawsijaj, miapaaj tu wawa, mańßamin mar~…ĺuk pakatawatawa namiŇč, paktin…ôŇč tuni kaudip nu sakinaja. i r~…ĺukijaw nu tatama, u kuku Ē~ °, u wajwaj ku sakamun, uduma satar~…ĺakaw…ôn ku kuku mińßuwad, pajdikud…ôn mi tukud atu mińßubańßup u tatajda sa, u udip ku mitijuŇčaj mik…ôr~…ĺid tu kuku Ē~ ° atu r~…ĺima, ńßinan u nu mur~…ĺuuŇčaj misar~…ĺukijaw. i kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwaj a nijadu ¶i kiniw ńßinisa, u sakidaja a tatajda masikad, kju misar~…ĺakijaw sa, ¶ajka ńßida tu paŇč ¶ańß mitat…ôbut pińßa ¶…ôŇč kuwajwaj.
S.FORM: dadiw atu lukiyaw mudadiw sa ku sikizaya. u lukiyaw caykalcad, sapamelaw tu tamdw sa u salukiyaw, u sapamelaw tu di'tu sa, mapalaw han. u mapalaway, namakayda i mapalaw ni pangangan, micukumisay malupu maluwahluwah sa, lukiyaw, u salukiyauhan. i taywanay a yincumin, u lukiyau nu heni, hiding tuni kaudip atu mahica ku lalangawan a misalukiyaw, u sakidaya a tamdaw mikilim tu lukiyaw a misuped sa, u lukiyaw nu sakidaya pakaynin ini kaluk, mibutingay ani kaudip ku lukiyaw. lalikid sakidaya mi cukumisay a lukiyaw lalikid han, u tatengaay milalikid, a palcaden ku kuku, paicelangen ku lima tawya sangulan, u lisin u masinanuday, tatengangay a lisin u tatama' dada' ku talabuway i sasalisinan malalikid, mahamin satu misa lisin sa, nu tatayda tu kumi salakiyaway. salukiyaw nasikamu u tatayna nu niyadu, inikaudip i demidemiad atu maluwahluwah' a lukiyaw, u salukiyaw han, milalad tuni ka udip, hinan u milutukay, mibutingay, patawsiyay, miapaay tu wawa, mahamin maluk pakatawatawa naming, paktineng tuni kaudip nu sakinaya. i lukiyaw nu tatama, u kuku', u wayway ku sakamun, uduma satalakawen ku kuku mihuwad, paydikuden mi tukud atu mihubahup u tatayda sa, u udip ku mitiyungay mikelid tu kuku' atu lima, hinan u nu muluungay misalukiyaw. i kaluluway a niyadu ci kiniw hinisa, u sakidaya a tatayda masikad, kyu misalakiyaw sa, cayka hida tu pangcah mitatebut pihaceng kuwayway.
S.PHON: dadiw atu r~…ĺukijaw mudadiw sa ku sikizaja. u r~…ĺukijaw ¶ajkar~…ĺ ¶ad, sapam…ôr~…ĺaw tu tamdw sa u sar~…ĺukijaw, u sapam…ôr~…ĺaw tu di Ē~ °tu sa, mapar~…ĺaw ńßan. u mapar~…ĺawaj, namakajda i mapar~…ĺaw ni paŇčaŇčan, mi ¶ukumisaj mar~…ĺupu mar~…ĺuwańßr~…ĺuwańß sa, r~…ĺukijaw, u sar~…ĺukijauńßan. i tajwanaj a jin ¶umin, u r~…ĺukijau nu ńß…ôni, ńßidiŇč tuni kaudip atu mańßi ¶a ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a misar~…ĺukijaw, u sakidaja a tamdaw mikir~…ĺim tu r~…ĺukijaw a misup…ôd sa, u r~…ĺukijaw nu sakidaja pakajnin ini kar~…ĺuk, mibutiŇčaj ani kaudip ku r~…ĺukijaw. r~…ĺar~…ĺikid sakidaja mi ¶ukumisaj a r~…ĺukijaw r~…ĺar~…ĺikid ńßan, u tat…ôŇčaaj mir~…ĺar~…ĺikid, a par~…ĺ ¶ad…ôn ku kuku, pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ku r~…ĺima tawja saŇčur~…ĺan, u r~…ĺisin u masinanudaj, tat…ôŇčaŇčaj a r~…ĺisin u tatama Ē~ ° dada Ē~ ° ku tar~…ĺabuwaj i sasar~…ĺisinan mar~…ĺar~…ĺikid, mańßamin satu misa r~…ĺisin sa, nu tatajda tu kumi sar~…ĺakijawaj. sar~…ĺukijaw nasikamu u tatajna nu nijadu, inikaudip i d…ômid…ômiad atu mar~…ĺuwańßr~…ĺuwańß Ē~ ° a r~…ĺukijaw, u sar~…ĺukijaw ńßan, mir~…ĺar~…ĺad tuni ka udip, ńßinan u mir~…ĺutukaj, mibutiŇčaj, patawsijaj, miapaaj tu wawa, mańßamin mar~…ĺuk pakatawatawa namiŇč, paktin…ôŇč tuni kaudip nu sakinaja. i r~…ĺukijaw nu tatama, u kuku Ē~ °, u wajwaj ku sakamun, uduma satar~…ĺakaw…ôn ku kuku mińßuwad, pajdikud…ôn mi tukud atu mińßubańßup u tatajda sa, u udip ku mitijuŇčaj mik…ôr~…ĺid tu kuku Ē~ ° atu r~…ĺima, ńßinan u nu mur~…ĺuuŇčaj misar~…ĺukijaw. i kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwaj a nijadu ¶i kiniw ńßinisa, u sakidaja a tatajda masikad, kju misar~…ĺakijaw sa, ¶ajka ńßida tu paŇč ¶ańß mitat…ôbut pińßa ¶…ôŇč kuwajwaj.
